creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Hi Alexey,

I agree with your naming suggestion.

But when I look now, I see that the sources of the new version aren't even on SourceForge any more. Arch takes them from the DropBox URL. We probably can't do that. It is somewhat of being not very open source any more.

And taking into account that freefilesync in its Windows version used to bundle with malware, and that it isn't all that useful and used, I would say I would drop this proposed port.

My suggestion is to close this bug without committing it. Not worthy of the time spent on it.

Thanks!
